title: Write t he request for factory reset
description: Use function code #505 to write the request for factory reset.
notes: 1. After factory reset, all data will be deleted and all settings will be restored to default . 2. If you use the account of the highest permissions (Admin) for factory reset, the Ethernet settings will be restored to default, and the error reports and warning reports will be cl eared. 2. Check whether the writing is successful from the return status in 0xCF - 0xD1. Modbus (Hex) Return status Description CF Function code 505 D0 Status 1: OK; 2: NOK D1 Error code - If successful, the read status (0xD0) is 1. If failed, the read status ( 0xD0) is 2. The error code is as follows: Code Error description Description 1 Confirm command Must be 99 Completed Correct the written content according to the error code 1. Send request for factory reset 0xC8 - 0xCE 2. Wait for the return status 0xCF - 0xD1 OK NOK
